Document:
# Dealer This guide will explain the network objectives that members of the Dealer network will get
## Criminal Bounties You will get a bounty to export a certain type of reagent, gas or item to an occupied Trade Station. The first step is using a cargo telepad to teleport a bounty manifest to you. You must be next to the telepad. For reagent bounties you must attach the label to a liquid tank. For gas bounties attach the label to a canister. For solid item bounties attach the label to a crate.
Export the bounty to the specified station.
Beware of local authorities as these bounties will hurt local infrastructure and raise Sector Chaos.
## The Hunter Becomes the Hunted If you are hunted by someone you can enter their secret phrase to compromise them, receiving the reward and neutralizing the hunt.
